overall.description: A character in wizard robes walks along a covered wooden walkway in a snowy, medieval-style village at dusk. The scene transitions from an enclosed bridge with views of snowy cliffs to an open descent into a cobblestone street with lantern-lit buildings.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered wooden walkway overlooking snowy cliffs

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the covered walkway, looking out at the snowy landscape through the railing

entered.detail: carved wooden balustrade running along the left side of the walkway
rough-hewn stone wall of the adjacent building
snow-dusted rocky cliff face visible through the railing
bare winter trees silhouetted against the dusk sky

segments.scene_description: The character walks along an enclosed wooden walkway with views of a snowy, rocky landscape visible through the left railing. The interior is dimly lit with warm artificial light contrasting the blue twilight outside.

scene_state.functional_zone: stone staircase descending into village square

events.description: exits covered walkway into open view of village street with descending stone stairs
begins descending the stone staircase toward the village below

agents.ego_description: walking down stone stairs toward a lantern-lit village street, approaching an NPC standing near a lamp post

notable_agents.action: standing still near a lantern post, holding a glowing lantern

entered.detail: worn stone steps descending into the village square
half-timbered medieval houses with glowing windows lining the street
tall iron post with a lit lantern illuminating the cobblestones

segments.scene_description: The character emerges from the covered walkway onto a stone staircase descending into a medieval village square. An NPC stands ahead near a lantern post, while timber-framed buildings with warm glowing windows line the cobblestone street below.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a sheltered wooden corridor into the open, lantern-lit heart of a snowy medieval village. It begins inside a dimly lit enclosed walkway, where warm interior lights contrast with the blue twilight and rocky, snow-covered cliffs visible through the railings. As the character advances, the enclosed space opens up, transitioning from the wooden bridge onto a stone staircase that descends toward the village square. The scene then expands to reveal a cobblestone street lined with timber-framed buildings and glowing windows, before finally approaching an NPC standing beside a flickering lantern post.
